publishedAbstract: - The ODF cluster intermittently reports HEALTH_WARN with the message MON_NETSPLIT: X network partitions detected. This occurs repeatedly even when standard networking tools (ping, nc) show no connectivity issues between nodes Key Observations:- Intermittent Nature: The warning often clears after restarting Monitor pods or switching the election strategy to classic, but reappears within minutes when returned to the required connectivity strategy.- Clock Skew Symptoms: The cluster may also report clock skew warnings (MON_CLOCK_SKEW), which are often a symptom of network latency delaying monitor messages rather than actual system clock drift.
publishedTitle: ODF: Recurring "Network Partitions Detected" Warnings in Stretch Clusters
